rationale: Gov't Code §2001.101 governs deposition opening procedures in contested agency cases. It is wholly unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 2001.101. OPENING OF DEPOSITION BY STATE AGENCY EMPLOYEE.
_note: Rule text concerns administrative hearing deposition procedure; no bearing on property tax homestead exemption amounts.
